stemHtml:
A pilot is flying a twin-engine piston aeroplane with all engines operating. Given the following information, what will be the vertical clearance over the obstacle listed below?

MTOM: 4750 kg
Airport elevation: 500 ft
Obstacle elevation: 644 ft
Distance of the obstacle from the end of the TOD: 2000 m
Temperature: ISA QNH: 1018 hPa
SID: straight departure, no specific climb requirements published
